name: Quick Hot Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cocoa, sugar, corn syrup, evaporated milk, and sour cream in a heavy saucepan.
2. Heat over medium flame, stirring constantly, until the mixture begins to boil.
3. Turn off heat; stir in butter and vanilla.
4. Serve warm. Makes enough for 4 good-size hot fudge sundaes.
